seoTitle: Bapaume vs Baralaba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bapaume and Baralaba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bapaume and Baralaba.
heading: Bapaume vs Baralaba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bapaume, Queensland and Baralaba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bapaume has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Baralaba (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bapaume or Baralaba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bapaume has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Baralaba scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bapaume scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Baralaba scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bapaume or Baralaba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bapaume has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
